---

## Summary: 26 adversarial tests across 3 categories

### Boundary Consistency (8 tests) — precondition violations
| # | Target Lemma | Violation |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `lemma_range_set_finite` | `lo > hi` |
| 2 | `lemma_range_set_len` | `lo > hi` |
| 3 | `lemma_free_range_implies_usage_bound` | `n = 0` |
| 4 | `lemma_insert_preserves_usage_bound` | `x = num_bits` (off-by-one) |
| 5 | `lemma_insert_preserves_usage_bound` | `x` already in set |
| 6 | `lemma_unset_bit_implies_has_free_bit` | `i = num_bits` |
| 7 | `lemma_set_bits_finite` | `num_bits = -1` |
| 8 | `lemma_usage_less_than_capacity_means_not_full` | `usage == num_bits` |

### Behavioral Consistency (10 tests) — wrong postconditions
| # | Target | Wrong assertion |
|---|---|---|
| 9-11 | `range_set_len` | Off-by-one (+1, -1, zero) |
| 12 | `Bitmap::new` | `is_full()` instead of `is_empty()` |
| 13 | `Bitmap::set` | `!is_bit_set` after set |
| 14 | `Bitmap::alloc` | `usage == 0` after alloc |
| 15 | `Bitmap::clear` | `is_bit_set` after clear |
| 16 | `Bitmap::alloc` | `index >= num_bits` |
| 17 | `usage_implies_full` | Assert bit NOT set after lemma |
| 18 | `set_bits_equal` | Assert free_range differs |

### Logical Consistency (8 tests) — non-entailed properties
| # | Property | Why it's wrong |
|---|---|---|
| 19 | `is_full ⟹ is_empty` | Contradictory states |
| 20 | `has_free_bit ⟹ free_range(2)` | Over-strengthened from 1→2 |
| 21 | Same capacity ⟹ same usage | False determinism |
| 22 | `usage=0 ⟹ num_bits=0` | False inverse |
| 23 | `range_set(0,5)` contains 5 | Half-open boundary error |
| 24 | `wf ⟹ has_free_bit` | Missing full-bitmap case |
| 25 | Alloc returns consecutive indices | Spec doesn't order allocations |
| 26 | `alloc_range` usage = size only | Ignores cumulative usage |
